parameters.query: SELECT se.id AS event_id, se.hire_id, se.event_type, se.scheduled_at, nh.full_name, nh.personal_email, nh.job_title, nh.manager_email, nh.department, nh.role_group FROM scheduled_events se JOIN new_hires nh ON se.hire_id = nh.hire_id WHERE se.status = 'PENDING' AND se.scheduled_at <= NOW() ORDER BY se.scheduled_at ASC
UPDATE scheduled_events SET status='COMPLETED', completed_at=NOW() WHERE id=$1
INSERT INTO onboarding_events (hire_id, event_type, status, details, performed_by) VALUES ($1,$2,'SUCCESS',$3::jsonb,'system')
